test.command: source .env && export PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN && bash -c 'NVIDIA_BASE="$(python3 -c "import sys,os;print(os.path.join(sys.prefix,\"lib\",f\"python{sys.version_info.major}.{sys.version_info.minor}\",\"site-packages\",\"nvidia\"))" 2>/dev/null||true)" && if [ -d "${NVIDIA_BASE:-}" ]; then for d in "$NVIDIA_BASE"/*/lib; do [ -d "$d" ] && LD_LIBRARY_PATH="$d:${LD_LIBRARY_PATH:-}"; done; export LD_LIBRARY_PATH; fi && clj -M:test'

typecheck.command: N/A — Clojure is dynamically typed; no typecheck validator per AGENTS.md

appliedUpdates.description: Documented chain registry in architecture.md — transform/registry.clj also contains a chains-registry atom for named transform chains defined via def-transform-chain
Documented PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN test requirement in environment.md — MT tests require the env var to be set, with instructions for running tests correctly

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to clojure-dsl-worker skill: When gpt-5.2 upstream is unavailable through the proxy, use gemini-2.5-flash as a fallback model for MT tests. The proxy supports multiple models. Document this in the 'Proxy MT Notes' section.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature transform-core worker discovered gpt-5.2 was unavailable, had to trial-and-error multiple models before finding gemini-2.5-flash works. Worker skillFeedback confirms this gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Proxy tokens and other secrets should only be read from environment variables via System/getenv or equivalent. Never log, print, or include auth tokens in curl commands during debugging. Use placeholder values in any logged examples.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature transform-core transcript showed PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN value in curl debug commands. Not committed to code, but visible in worker transcript.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: Centralize shared utility functions (especially cryptographic operations like SHA-256 hashing) in a dedicated promptbench.util namespace rather than duplicating as private functions across namespaces.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature transform-pipeline-integration duplicated SHA-256 hashing in transform_stages.clj, already present in manifest.clj and transform/core.clj. Three independent implementations of the same algorithm across 3 namespaces.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to clojure-dsl-worker skill: When implementing pipeline stages that depend on external services (like MT proxy), use mock implementations in integration tests rather than calling the real service. Document the mock pattern: define a local function with the same signature as the real transform impl, and bind it via the transform registry in test setup.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature transform-pipeline-integration worker created mock-mt function for pipeline tests, but discovered this pattern themselves without skill guidance. Worker skillFeedback confirms this suggestion.
